languages.text: Корабль понес огромные потери, лишившись большой части рабочего населения и обоих хирургеонов, безуспешно пытающихся спасти тех, у кого еще была надежда.
The ship suffered huge losses, including a large portion of the working population, as well as both chirurgeons, who had tried in vain to save those who still had hope.
languages.original_text: Корабль понес огромные потери, лишившись большой части рабочего населения и обоих хирургеонов, безуспешно пытающихся спасти тех, у кого еще была надежда.

traits.locale_text: The ship suffered huge losses, including a large portion of the working population, as well as both chirurgeons, who had tried in vain to save those who still had hope.
The ship suffered huge losses, including a large portion of the working population, as well as both chirurgeons, who had tried in vain to save those who still had hope.
The ship suffered huge losses, including a large portion of the working population, as well as both chirurgeons, who had tried in vain to save those who still had hope.

languages.text: 船は、労働人口の大半を失い、さらに、まだ救える可能性のある人々を救おうと必死に努力した外科医の二人も亡くなった。
languages.original_text: The ship suffered huge losses, including a large portion of the working population, as well as both chirurgeons, who had tried in vain to save those who still had hope.

traits.locale_text: 船は、労働人口の大半を失い、さらに、まだ救える可能性のある人々を救おうと必死に努力した外科医の二人も亡くなった。

languages.text: 旗舰损失惨重。大部分劳动力人口丧生，两位试图拯救伤患的船医也在无力中死去。
languages.original_text: The ship suffered huge losses, including a large portion of the working population, as well as both chirurgeons, who had tried in vain to save those who still had hope.

traits.locale_text: 旗舰损失惨重。大部分劳动力人口丧生，两位试图拯救伤患的船医也在无力中死去。

languages.text: Le vaisseau subit de lourdes pertes, y compris une grande partie de la main-d'œuvre et les deux chirurgeons, qui avaient tenté en vain de sauver ceux qui pouvaient encore espérer s'en sortir.
languages.original_text: The ship suffered huge losses, including a large portion of the working population, as well as both chirurgeons, who had tried in vain to save those who still had hope.

traits.locale_text: Le vaisseau subit de lourdes pertes, y compris une grande partie de la main-d'œuvre et les deux chirurgeons, qui avaient tenté en vain de sauver ceux qui pouvaient encore espérer s'en sortir.

languages.text: La nave sufrió grandes bajas, incluyendo una gran porción de la población trabajadora y a ambos cirujanos, que trataron en vano de salvar a quienes aún tenían esperanza.
languages.original_text: The ship suffered huge losses, including a large portion of the working population, as well as both chirurgeons, who had tried in vain to save those who still had hope.

traits.locale_text: La nave sufrió grandes bajas, incluyendo una gran porción de la población trabajadora y a ambos cirujanos, que trataron en vano de salvar a quienes aún tenían esperanza.

languages.text: Gemi, çalışan nüfusun büyük bir kısmı ve hâlâ umudu olanları kurtarmak için boşuna çabalayan her iki cerrah da dâhil olmak üzere büyük kayıplar verdi.
languages.original_text: The ship suffered huge losses, including a large portion of the working population, as well as both chirurgeons, who had tried in vain to save those who still had hope.

traits.locale_text: Gemi, çalışan nüfusun büyük bir kısmı ve hâlâ umudu olanları kurtarmak için boşuna çabalayan her iki cerrah da dâhil olmak üzere büyük kayıplar verdi.

languages.text: Das Schiff erlitt gewaltige Verluste und verlor neben einem großen Teil seiner Arbeiter beide Chirurgeums, die vergeblich versucht hatten, jene zu retten, die noch Hoffnung hatten.
languages.original_text: The ship suffered huge losses, including a large portion of the working population, as well as both chirurgeons, who had tried in vain to save those who still had hope.
